name: Coffee Liqueur Zesty Seafood Marinade/Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a covered jar and shake well to mix.
2. Allow the mixture to stand for 1 hour or longer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are fully blended.
3. Give the marinade another good shake before using.
4. Pour over fish fillets and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Grill the fish, basting frequently with remaining marinade.
